title: Angot Conglomeration
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Angot Conglomeration''' was small group of businesses active during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. One of the organization's members was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] called [[Hatras Nikk]].

{{Company-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]''
